description: Recursive discoveries surfaced by dossier agents. Each entry: a person mentioned in a dossier as worth following up. Status: pending|approved|dossiered|rejected.

discoveries.name: Sumith Kulal
discoveries.context: Fellow FLUX.1 Kontext co-author at Black Forest Labs. Stanford CS / Hazy Research alum — bridges Chris Re cluster to BFL.

discoveries.name: Chenlin Meng
discoveries.context: Pika CTO. DDIM co-author with Jiaming Song. Stanford Ermon lab. 4th node in diffusion-into-video cluster.

discoveries.name: Robin Rombach
discoveries.context: Black Forest Labs CEO. LDM/Stable Diffusion creator. The BFL founder.

discoveries.name: Sharon Zhou
discoveries.context: Lamini CEO. Saksham's direct manager 2023-2024. Indian-American female founder. Stanford CS PhD under Andrew Ng.

discoveries.name: Tanishq Kumar
discoveries.context: Harvard math '25 -> Stanford CS PhD (Sep 2025) under Percy Liang + Tatsu Hashimoto. ICLR 2025 Oral Scaling Laws for Precision. ~5+ pre-PhD ICLR/ICML papers via Pehlevan/Bordelon. Indian-origin (Tanishq Mathew Kumar). Reference class: Niklas Muennighoff. Site: tanishqkumar.github.io.

discoveries.name: Christina Baek
discoveries.context: CMU final-year PhD (Kolter + Raghunathan). Presidential Fellow. UC Berkeley EECS BS + 5th-year MS under Yi Ma. WiSE-FT reasoning-diversity paper (COLM 2025). Korean-American, female. DatologyAI + Google internships. @_christinabaek.

discoveries.name: Jacob Mitchell Springer
discoveries.context: CMU 3rd-year MLD PhD (Raghunathan). NSF GRFP. Lead 1st author on SCOPE Outstanding Paper + 2 ICML 2026 papers including an oral. Swarthmore CS '22 + Los Alamos pre-PhD. 5 first-author award-tier papers in 3 years. sprin.xyz.

discoveries.name: Andrew Li
discoveries.context: Judgment Labs Chief Scientist co-founder, 23. Early research hire at Together AI (Tri Dao's company). UC Berkeley. Best friends with Alex Shan + Joseph Camyre since childhood.

discoveries.name: Yichuan Wang
discoveries.context: Berkeley SkyLab 2nd-yr PhD, SJTU ACM Honored Class. LEANN lead author (MLSys 2026 Best Paper). Chenfeng called him 'one of my favorite people to cook with' + teased 'our next project might be even crazier'.

discoveries.name: Haocheng Xi
discoveries.context: Berkeley Keutzer + MIT HAN Lab. Tsinghua Yao Class '24. Quant VideoGen lead (7x KV memory reduction). Connects directly to architecture cluster.

discoveries.name: Monishwaran Maheswaran
discoveries.context: Berkeley Honors EECS+Math. Indian. Squeeze Evolve lead (97.5% ARC-AGI-V2 SoTA). BAIR + Berkeley Lab nuclear fusion.

discoveries.name: Junxiong Wang
discoveries.context: Cornell PhD + Together AI. Aurora + I-DLM co-author with Chenfeng.

discoveries.name: Ninad Jadhav
discoveries.context: REACT Lab labmate of Weiying Wang. WSR co-author. 'Trust-Based Algorithms for Resilient Multiagent' thesis. Highest-probability co-founder candidate for Weiying's stealth humanoid co.

discoveries.name: Yilun Du
discoveries.context: Harvard CS + Kempner Institute Assistant Professor. Embodied Minds Lab. Ex-OpenAI / ex-Google DeepMind. MIT EECS PhD under Kaelbling+Lozano-Perez+Tenenbaum. Verify before using as warm intro for Weiying.

discoveries.name: Dustin Tran
discoveries.context: DeepMind. TFP collaborator with Joshua Dillon. Major probabilistic ML researcher. Mid-career, departure watch candidate.

discoveries.name: Yaniv Ovadia
discoveries.context: Google. 1st author on 'Can you trust your model's uncertainty' (2,839 cites). Could be next departure candidate.

discoveries.name: Jie Ren
discoveries.context: DeepMind. 1st author on 'Likelihood ratios for OOD detection' (1,019 cites). Joshua co-author.

discoveries.name: Prithwish Dan
discoveries.context: Cornell CS MS student in Sanjiban Choudhury's PoRTaL lab. Co-1st author on 6 papers with Kushal Kedia: X-Sim (CoRL 2025 Oral + RSS EgoAct Best Paper Runner-up), X-Diffusion (ICRA 2026), RHyME (ICRA 2025), ManiCast (CoRL 2023), Game-Theoretic Framework (IROS 2023), InteRACT (ICRA 2024). MOST LIKELY CO-FOUNDER CANDIDATE if Kushal goes founder route — graduating MS in 2026 into same humanoid market. Site: pdan101.github.io. Verified Scholar BZGUSN8AAAAJ at cornell.edu. Indian (likely IIT undergrad). Watch his next-step LinkedIn announcement — if same place as Kushal that's industry hire; if they incorporate together, that's founding move.

discoveries.name: Tyler Ga Wei Lum
discoveries.context: Stanford CS PhD in C. Karen Liu's lab. Co-1st author on SimToolReal (arXiv Feb 2026) with Kushal Kedia + Bohg + Karen Liu — zero-shot dexterous tool manipulation. Verified Scholar kPq6-XIAAAAJ at stanford.edu. The Karen Liu lab bridge for Kushal. If Karen Liu's partial leave Jan-Jun 2026 is at a humanoid co, Tyler likely follows. Dexterous manipulation = direct PI / Figure / 1X wedge.

discoveries.name: Sanjiban Choudhury
discoveries.context: Cornell CS Assistant Professor + ML Researcher at Aurora (autonomous trucking, $5B+ public co). Leads PoRTaL group (Personal Robotics at Cornell). ONR Young Investigator 2024 + OpenAI Superalignment Award 2024 + Google Research Award 2024. CMU RI PhD (Sebastian Scherer). Started Cornell Aug 2021. Advisor relationship node — if Kushal/Prithwish go founder, Choudhury becomes high-signal LP / advisor candidate. Lab alumni pipeline: Kushal Kedia (graduating May 26), Huaxiaoyue Wang, Juntao Ren, Rajat Kumar Jenamani, Atiksh Bhardwaj, Yuki Wang, Gonzalo Gonzalez-Pumariega. PoRTaL alumni map = future founding cohort tracker.

discoveries.name: Huaxiaoyue Wang
discoveries.context: Cornell CS PhD student in Choudhury PoRTaL lab. Co-1st author on MOSAIC (CoRL 2024 + Best Paper VLMNM ICRA 24 + Best Poster MoMa ICRA 24). Senior lab member. Verified Scholar yweLdycAAAAJ at cs.cornell.edu. Chinese-origin. Track for own graduation timeline.

discoveries.name: Maximus Adrian Pace
discoveries.context: Cornell CS MS in PoRTaL lab. Co-1st on X-Diffusion (ICRA 2026), co-author on X-Sim + RHyME. Verified Scholar GvFzdWoAAAAJ. Cornell MS in CS. Robotics imitation learning focus.

discoveries.name: Rajat Kumar Jenamani
discoveries.context: Cornell CS PhD. IIT KGP undergrad — co-author on Kushal's 2020 pre-PhD motion-planning paper. The IIT KGP -> Cornell PhD pipeline node. Verified Scholar 1lVR0HoAAAAJ at cornell.edu. Indian. Track for graduation + post-PhD step.

discoveries.name: Juntao Ren
discoveries.context: Cornell CS (Choudhury PoRTaL). Co-1st on MOSAIC + 1st author on Human-to-Robot Transfer Learning (ICRA 2025, arXiv:2501.06994). PoRTaL alumni cohort.

discoveries.name: Atiksh Bhardwaj
discoveries.context: Cornell undergrad/MS. Long-term PoRTaL collaborator — co-author on InteRACT (ICRA 24), ManiCast, X-Diffusion. Watch for grad school choice.

discoveries.name: C. Karen Liu
discoveries.context: Stanford CS Professor (humanoid + character animation + computational biomechanics). ACM SIGGRAPH Academy 2021 + Sloan 2010 + MIT TR Young Innovators 2007 + SIGGRAPH Significant New Researcher 2012. UW CS PhD. Ex-Georgia Tech IC. **ON PARTIAL LEAVE JAN-JUN 2026** — high-information signal, most likely humanoid co sabbatical (PI / Figure / 1X / Skild / Boston Dynamics candidate). Stanford Movement Lab + Bio-X + HAI + Wu Tsai Human Performance Alliance. Affiliated humanoid network: Stanford IPRL (Bohg) + Tyler Lum (SimToolReal co-1st w/ Kushal). Verify destination if possible — that tells us where Kushal is most likely heading.

discoveries.name: Jeannette Bohg
discoveries.context: Stanford CS Assistant Professor. Director of IPRL (Interactive Perception and Robot Learning Lab). 2023 Sloan Research Fellowship + 2019 IEEE RAS Early Career + 2020 RSS Early Career. KTH PhD. Ex-MPI Autonomous Motion. Canonical Stanford robotic grasping + manipulation group. Advisor relationship node for Kushal's Stanford visit. Lab pipeline: Tyler Lum + others. Track IPRL student departures.

discoveries.name: Wei-Chiu Ma
discoveries.context: Cornell CS Assistant Professor. MIT PhD under Antonio Torralba + Raquel Urtasun. Ex-Senior Research Scientist at Uber ATG + Waabi. CMU MS in Robotics under Kris Kitani. Siebel Scholar 2022. CPS Rising Star 2023. 3D/4D computer vision -> robotics bridge. Kushal's co-advisor. Lab students: Chuanruo Ning, Guangzhao He, Rundong Luo, Tao Tu, Xuyi Meng. Track Cornell vision-robotics pipeline.

discoveries.name: Karan Singhal
discoveries.context: Co-equal first author (listed first) on Med-PaLM (Nature 2023, 5,747 cites) + Med-PaLM 2 (Nature Medicine 2025, 2,428 cites) — combined 8,175 cites. Stanford BS+MS CS '19 (4.1/4.0 MS GPA), initiated + main instructor of Stanford's first CS+Social Good AI ethics class. Departed Google → OpenAI on July 22, 2024 (X tweet 1815444769868574944; CORRECTION from earlier 'Aug 2024' — actual date is Jul 22) — the FIRST AMIE-cluster departure signal. Now Head of Health AI + AGI Benefits @ OpenAI. ~21,541 Scholar cites, h-26, i10-34. Shipped HealthBench (May 2025, 49K rubric items / 250+ physicians / 60 countries) + OpenAI for Healthcare (Jan 8 2026, HIPAA, 8 named hospital systems: Boston Children's / Cedars-Sinai / MSK / Stanford Children's / UCSF / AdventHealth / Baylor Scott & White / HCA) + ChatGPT for Clinicians + HealthBench Professional (Apr 22 2026 pinned tweet, 1.6M impressions) + Penda Health Kenya RCT. TIME100 Health 2026 (Feb 11 2026). Co-author GPT-4o + o1 + GPT-5 + gpt-oss system cards. Second AMIE departure CONFIRMED: Khaled Saab (Stanford EE PhD under Chris Ré, CLAUDE.md critical lab) now on Karan's OpenAI Health team (Jan 13 2026 reply tweet). If Vivek ever founds, Karan is the most likely co-founder. Indian-origin (Singhal = North Indian Vaishya/Marwari). Departure-watch trigger: OpenAI → OpenAI Foundation transition pattern (Yo Shavit May 25 2026 precedent). T1, relationship-build.

discoveries.name: Tao Tu
discoveries.context: First author on AMIE conversational (Nature 2025, 733 cites), AMIE-DDx (Nature 2025), Med-PaLM M / Towards Generalist Biomedical AI (NEJM AI 2024, 819 cites). CMU PhD. The current most-prolific first author on Vivek Natarajan's bench. The Tao+Vivek pairing is the obvious AMIE-spinout founding bench if Google chooses not to productize. Track LinkedIn affiliation + Twitter bio for departure signal.

discoveries.name: Khaled Saab
discoveries.context: First author 'Capabilities of Gemini models in medicine' (arXiv 2024, 496 cites). Stanford EE PhD under Chris Ré — CLAUDE.md critical lab. Hazy Research alumnus — the canonical Stanford → founder feeder lab (Tri Dao → Together AI; Dan Fu → Cartesia; Sukjun Hwang in repo). BRIDGES DeepMind health team ↔ Chris Ré cluster. The single highest-priority recursive discovery from Vivek's network — combines frontier-lab medical research + Hazy Research lineage. Departure-candidate by archetype.

discoveries.name: Anil (Anand) Palepu
discoveries.context: Co-first author on AMIE conversational (Nature 2025). Harvard-MIT HST PhD (Health Sciences and Technology) — the clinician-engineer track that produces MD/PhD-adjacent researchers with both clinical and ML depth. Rare and high-leverage profile. Track for departure / startup advisor roles.

discoveries.name: Alan Karthikesalingam
discoveries.context: Co-lead of Project AMIE with Vivek Natarajan. UK clinician-researcher (ophthalmologist by training, NHS background). The dosa-lunch Med-PaLM co-originator (he had the conversation with Vivek at the Mountain View dosa restaurant where Vivek wrote the first Med-PaLM project draft). Less likely to leave (clinician identity, UK-based) but would be a co-founder if AMIE spins out.

discoveries.name: Mike Schaekermann
discoveries.context: Co-first author AMIE conversational. HCI / human-AI interaction background. Senior research scientist at Google DeepMind health team. Less likely founder candidate than Tu/Saab/Palepu but a key node in the AMIE cluster.

discoveries.name: Shekoofeh Azizi
discoveries.context: Senior author on Med-PaLM and self-supervised medical imaging work (ICCV 2021, 1,016 cites). UBC PhD. Long-running Vivek Natarajan collaborator since the pre-medical era at FAIR / Google. Iranian-origin senior researcher.

discoveries.name: Juraj Gottweis
discoveries.context: First author 'Towards an AI Co-Scientist' (arXiv 2025, 522 cites). DeepMind AI-for-science lead. Co-leads the parallel team that Vivek also contributes to. AI Co-Scientist deployed via US Genesis Mission across all 17 Department of Energy National Labs in 2025.

discoveries.name: Greg Corrado
discoveries.context: Head of Google Health AI. Google Brain co-founder. The senior sponsor who recruited Vivek Natarajan to Google Health ~2020 and offered him the chance to lead Med-PaLM. If HE leaves, it's a multi-person cascade signal across the entire Google health team. Tier-3 watch (very senior, low departure probability).

discoveries.name: Kevin Esvelt
discoveries.context: Vikram's MIT PhD advisor. Runs the Sculpting Evolution lab (MIT Media Lab): gene-drive invention, biosecurity (SecureDNA / DNA-synthesis screening), continuous directed evolution (PACE/PANCE), protein engineering. The lab cohort is the recursive target — protein-engineering + biosecurity ICs who could spin out. Map current/recent lab members for the next ai-bio founder profile.

discoveries.name: Lucy Colwell
discoveries.context: Vikram's Cambridge Churchill-year advisor (ML for active-ligand prediction); now also at Google DeepMind. ML-for-protein-fitness pioneer. High-value warm-intro node and a direct bridge into the DeepMind protein-design orbit. Her lab/group is a recursive target for protein-ML ICs.

discoveries.name: Generate:Biomedicines research team
discoveries.context: Vikram's current employer's ML research group (Chroma / generative-protein-structure diffusion). Flagship-backed, $273M Series C (NVIDIA+Amgen), ~$700M raised. Recursive target: identify adjacent founder-profile ML scientists on the protein/antibody-generation team. Co-departure of 2+ would be an ai-bio founding signal.

discoveries.name: 2020 Hertz Fellowship cohort
discoveries.context: Vikram is a 2020 Hertz Fellow. The Hertz alumni base is one of the densest deep-tech founder networks in existence (~15 fellows/yr, heavily founder-skewed). Recursive target: map the 2020 cohort and adjacent years for frontier-AI/bio founders. Owner explicitly values Hertz as a top signal.

discoveries.name: Google Accelerated Science alumni
discoveries.context: Vikram did a ~1-year Google Accelerated Science AI residency (~2019-20, DNA-encoded libraries). GAS seeded a generation of science-ML people; alumni are a recursive target for AI-for-science founders.

discoveries.name: Zhengxuan “Zen” Wu
discoveries.context: Stanford NLP PhD (Potts/Manning lab), lead author on pyvene, ReFT, and AxBench — the interpretability/representation-finetuning tooling principal (Aryaman is co-first on ReFT/AxBench). If anyone in the Stanford causal-interp tooling group commercializes interp infra, Wu is the most likely. Higher-priority spinout-watch than Aryaman within this group.

discoveries.name: Atticus Geiger
discoveries.context: Originator of Distributed Alignment Search (DAS) and the causal-abstraction theory of mechanistic interpretability (JMLR 2025, 228 cites). Runs the Pr(Ai)2R Group. The theoretical spine of the Stanford causal-interp research line; frequent Aryaman/Wu collaborator.

discoveries.name: Christopher Potts causal-interpretability lab cohort
discoveries.context: The Potts/Manning Stanford NLP causal-interpretability group is a specific high-output cluster producing both papers (ReFT, AxBench, CausalGym, causal abstraction) and adopted tooling (pyvene, pyreft). Worth mapping as a cohort — members beyond Aryaman Arora, Zhengxuan Wu, Atticus Geiger include Jing Huang, Zheng Wang, and other Potts/Jurafsky advisees. A feeder for interp-commercialization talent (Goodfire/Transluce/Anthropic).

discoveries.name: FutureHouse team / Sam Rodriques (+ Edison Scientific spinout)
discoveries.context: FutureHouse (Sam Rodriques + Andrew White, Eric-Schmidt-backed AI-for-science nonprofit; agents Crow/Falcon/Owl/Phoenix) spun out the for-profit Edison Scientific ($70M seed). Chenglei interned there summer 2025 on research agents for chem/bio. The org is the direct commercial frontier of the AI-Scientists thesis and a feeder of founding-scientist talent. Map: Sam Rodriques, Andrew White, Edison Scientific founding team, and other 2025 interns/researchers. Peer to rekursiv.ai (Dan Kondratyuk + Joshua Dillon, both T0).

discoveries.name: Diyi Yang SALT Lab (Stanford) cohort
discoveries.context: Diyi Yang's Stanford SALT Lab (social NLP, human-AI interaction, research automation) co-advises Chenglei Si with Hashimoto. Worth mapping as a cohort alongside the Hashimoto lab (which also produces Tanishq Kumar, T2). Feeder for AI-Scientists / human-AI-collaboration commercialization talent.

discoveries.name: Design2Code collaborators (Yanzhe Zhang, Zhengyuan Yang, Ruibo Liu)
discoveries.context: Co-authors on Design2Code (NAACL 2025, 178 cites, screenshot->front-end-code benchmark): Yanzhe Zhang (Georgia Tech), Zhengyuan Yang (Microsoft), Ruibo Liu (Google DeepMind / ex). Vision-to-code / agentic-coding-eval talent adjacent to both the AI-Scientists and agentic-coding clusters.

discoveries.name: Aravind Rajeswaran
discoveries.context: R3M co-author (FAIR/Meta). Robot-representation + dexterous-manipulation researcher; part of the Meta AI robot-learning cluster behind R3M and downstream embodied-AI work.

discoveries.name: Vikash Kumar
discoveries.context: R3M co-author (FAIR/Meta). Dexterous manipulation + RoboHive/robot-learning infrastructure; recurring senior collaborator across Suraj Nair robot-learning papers.

discoveries.name: Abhinav Gupta
discoveries.context: R3M senior co-author (CMU / ex-FAIR). Senior PI on the FAIR robot-representation cluster; advisor-lineage node for embodied-AI talent.

discoveries.name: Karol Hausman
discoveries.context: CEO + co-founder of Physical Intelligence ($5.6B). Ex-Google Brain robotics. The PI founding-team / spin-out cluster Suraj sits inside — track for org-level departure signals and adjacent founding teams.

discoveries.name: Vidhi Jain
discoveries.context: Researcher at OpenAI (AI for Science team). CMU Robotics PhD 2022-2025 (Yonatan Bisk). Prior: Google DeepMind student researcher, Meta FAIR AI Resident (embodied AI). OVRL/OVRL-V2 embodied nav (SOTA ImageNav +86% rel). Co-author Open X-Embodiment/RT-X (ICRA 2024 Best Paper) — robotics-VLA cluster node w/ Pannag Sanketi + Siddharth Karamcheti + Suraj Nair. Indian-origin, female. Co-author (not lead) on cluster-defining papers; just started OpenAI = locked in. Watch: departure to found in 2-3yr. LinkedIn vidhijain96.

discoveries.name: Varun Jampani
discoveries.context: Chief AI Officer at Arcade AI (Oct 2025-, generative product design). Heavyweight 3D-generation + diffusion researcher. Prior: Stability AI VP Research (Aug 2024-Oct 2025), Google Research Senior RS (2019-2023), NVIDIA Research (2017-2019). 93+ pubs, very high cites, 3D-gen authority (Stable Video Material Diffusion, multi-view PBR). Indian-origin. NOT a founder (exec hire at existing co). Stability AI VP Research alum = diaspora founder pool, connects to Robin Rombach (ex-Stability, BFL CEO). Watch: CAIO roles don't always stick; 3D-gen heavyweight going founder = real signal. Site varunjampani.github.io.

discoveries.name: Kush Bhatia
discoveries.context: Now at Google DeepMind (recent). Berkeley EECS PhD (Peter Bartlett + Anca Dragan, statistical ML theory) -> Stanford postdoc with Chris Re (Hazy Research) -> DeepMind. TART (NeurIPS 2023, task-agnostic in-context reasoning) + Cookbook (LLM data templates). MSR India fellow (Prateek Jain + Manik Varma). Rare theory(Bartlett)+LLM-systems(Re) crossover. ~6-7th Hazy node in repo (Wornow/Ishan Khare/Neel Guha/Dan Biderman). Likely Indian-origin. Just landed DeepMind = locked in. Watch: theory+systems researcher founds infra/post-training co in 2-4yr. Scholar X-Sd3-8AAAAJ.

discoveries.name: Andrew Dai
discoveries.context: 'Exploring something new' (stealth-ish). Ex-Sakana AI + ex-Aleph Alpha AI Researcher. Trinity College Dublin (Mech Eng, NOT CS). Research: LLMs + Quality-Diversity + open-endedness (Ken Stanley lineage, 'Why Greatness Cannot Be Planned'). AC/DC (ICLR 2026, coevolving LLM populations+tasks), QD-through-AI-Feedback (ICLR 2024). Co-founded Formula Trinity Autonomous. BORDERLINE: niche-but-real (Sakana evolutionary-AI lineage, AI-Scientists adjacent) but modest pedigree + cites vs repo bar. FLIP TRIGGER: if 'something new' resolves into a named open-endedness/evolutionary-AI company. Twitter @andrewdai99, GitHub daia99.

discoveries.name: Raunaq Bhirangi
discoveries.context: NYU CILVR postdoc (Pinto lab). Listed as 'co-founder of a stealth robotics company' on Pinto's lab page — IDENTICAL descriptor to Siddhant Haldar, who is his most frequent recent co-author (EgoZero, Feel the Force, Touch Begins Where Vision Ends). Built AnySkin/ReSkin (leading low-cost magnetic tactile sensors). STRONG HYPOTHESIS: same company as Haldar (complementary tactile-hardware vs policy/IL). Cracking his company cracks Haldar's. @raunaqmb.

discoveries.name: Ademi Adeniji
discoveries.context: Co-founder of Grounded Superintelligence (gsi.company). UC Berkeley PhD (Pieter Abbeel; prior Stanford BS/MS Fei-Fei Li/Animesh Garg), Pinto-lab affiliate. Heavy Haldar co-author (EgoZero, Feel the Force). Thesis: solving Moravec's paradox by scaling human physical data. @AdemiAdeniji.

discoveries.name: Lerrel Pinto
discoveries.context: NYU CILVR PI, Haldar's PhD advisor. Robotics-founder factory: Denis Yarats->Perplexity CTO, Fauna Robotics->Amazon (Mar 2026), ARI (w/ Xiaolong Wang)->Meta (May 2026); now Meta Superintelligence Labs. Track his NEXT spinout — cluster-defining. Not a target, an anchor + warm-intro node.

discoveries.name: Zichen (Jeff) Cui
discoveries.context: Current NYU CILVR PhD (Pinto). First author DynaMo (NeurIPS 2024), Behavior Transformers, From Play to Policy. Strong representation-learning / visuo-motor researcher. Watch on graduation. jeffcui.com; GitHub jeffacce.

discoveries.name: Jyo Pari (Jyothish Pari)
discoveries.context: FISH (RSS 2023 Best Student Paper) co-first author with Haldar. Now MIT PhD on continual learning / LM adaptation (Scale-ML); pivoted off robotics but elite pedigree and a Haldar collaborator. @jyo_pari.

discoveries.name: Irmak Guzey
discoveries.context: Current NYU CILVR PhD (Pinto). Dexterous manipulation + tactile (co-author Open Teach). Same touch-robotics vein as Bhirangi/Haldar. Still in lab.

discoveries.name: Alex Yu
discoveries.context: MONITOR (not a live lead). Recognized Luma AI Cofounder & CTO; PlenOctrees/Plenoxels/pixelNeRF (Berkeley, Kanazawa lab, ~6,800 cites). Left Luma early 2025 -> NOW on OpenAI image-gen team (demoed ChatGPT Images 2.0 with Sam Altman, Apr 2026). NOT building a new company. Becomes a HARD T0 the day he leaves OpenAI (ex-Luma-CTO + ex-OpenAI-image-lead = top-decile 2nd-time founder). Monitor alexyu.net + @alexyu00 + github @sxyu for next bio flip.

discoveries.name: Matthew Tancik
discoveries.context: Original NeRF co-author (Berkeley); Plenoxels/PlenOctrees collaborator with Alex Yu. NeRF/radiance-field founder-vein. One-line status check worth doing — where is he now, building?

discoveries.name: Overworld
discoveries.context: World-model foundation lab; named partner/customer of Reactor. Company (not person) to profile — who founded it, funding, thesis. Real-time world-models cluster.

discoveries.name: Bryce Schmidtchen
discoveries.context: Co-founder & CTO of Reactor (with Alberto Taiuti). Ex-Apple Vision Pro technical lead; kernel/CV optimization. NOT a lead (committed to Reactor) — indexed as a high-quality node.

discoveries.name: Dhruv Pai
discoveries.context: Co-founder & Chief Scientist of Tilde Research (mech-interp lab, $8M Khosla seed). Stanford STAIR lab (learning dynamics) — the technical/younger half of Tilde. Worth a closer profile; the deeper-research co-founder. stairlab.stanford.edu/members/dhruv_pai.

discoveries.name: Rylan Schaeffer
discoveries.context: Stanford STAIR-lab researcher; Dhruv Pai's advisor. Prolific on model collapse / scaling / interp. Lab to map — produces precocious researchers (Pai). Possible founder-factory node.

discoveries.name: Hazel (Mason Wang's prior startup)
discoveries.context: Mason Wang's first company (Co-Founder/CTO, 2023-24, $2M Pear VC at his 17). Profile the company + any co-founders/team as a node; Pear relationship is a warm path to Mason's next thing.

discoveries.name: Zhuo Chen
discoveries.context: 1st author of QuanTA (NeurIPS 2024, quantum-informed high-rank LLM fine-tuning); MIT/Soljačić. The one who beat Owen Dugan to first-author on QuanTA — young AI×physics researcher worth a look.

discoveries.name: Sabri Eyuboglu
discoveries.context: Senior Hazy Research (Chris Ré) PhD; recurs across the repo (co-author on fact-storing MLPs etc.) but lacks a dedicated dossier. Core Hazy figure — worth his own page.

discoveries.name: Simran Arora
discoveries.context: Senior Hazy Research (Chris Ré) PhD (Based, ZoologY/linear-attention architectures). Referenced across the repo, no dedicated page. Strong founder-watch in the Hazy cohort.

discoveries.name: Jerry Liu (JW Liu)
discoveries.context: Hazy Research; first-authors the least-squares-in-transformers line + on Fact-Storing MLPs with Owen Dugan + Chris Ré.

discoveries.name: Mehul Damani
discoveries.context: Isha Puri's most frequent collaborator (co-first on 'Beyond Binary Rewards', ICLR'26). MIT PhD, RL-for-reasoning. @MehulDamani2. Highest-signal name in her orbit.

discoveries.name: Idan Shenfeld
discoveries.context: MIT PhD (Pulkit Agrawal), RLHF/alignment; co-author with Isha Puri on 3 papers. @IdanShenfeld.

discoveries.name: Akarsh Kumar
discoveries.context: MIT, open-endedness/evolution (w/ Sebastian Risi); co-author with Isha Puri on Vector Policy Optimization. @akarshkumar0101.

discoveries.name: Amy X. Lu
discoveries.context: Cade Gordon's protein-LM co-author (Protein LM Fitness, ICLR'25). Berkeley CS PhD → Research Scientist at Isomorphic Labs; author of PLAID/CHEAP/CPCProt (all-atom protein generation from function/organism prompts). Deeply-technical AI-for-bio / protein-ML frontier. @amyxlu, amyx.lu.

discoveries.name: Marvin Li
discoveries.context: Harvard undergrad; LEAD author on 'Blink of an Eye: feature localization in generative models' (ICML 2025 Oral, w/ Aayush Karan + Sitan Chen). Won the Captain Jonathan Fay Prize (Harvard's top thesis prize) for the thesis behind it. Strong young inflection — worth a dedicated dossier. marvinfli.github.io. (Note: distinct from the 'Marvin Li' RSI entry surfaced earlier — verify which.)

discoveries.name: Jubayer Ibn Hamid
discoveries.context: 1st author of Polychromic Objectives for RL (ICLR'26, w/ Ellen Xu + Finn + Sadigh). Stanford CS PhD (Dorsa Sadigh + Chelsea Finn + Noah Goodman); Google DeepMind student researcher; RL exploration for scientific discovery. jubayer-ibn-hamid.github.io.

discoveries.name: Ifdita Hasan Orney
discoveries.context: 2nd author of Polychromic (ICLR'26); Stanford SAIL; lead author of Poly-EPO (exploratory reasoning models, set-RL follow-on).

discoveries.context: Dolma 1st author; Kyle Lo's data co-lead twin. Now at Microsoft MAI with Kyle. Watch the Lo+Soldaini pair as a unit for the next departure — if they leave together it's a data-infra company. @soldni.

discoveries.context: Adept co-founder/CEO; left Amazon AGI (where Adept landed) Feb 2026 'to cook up something new.' A genuinely FRESH possibly-inception node off the Adept tree (unlike Augustus's Arda, which is McGrew's $700M co past inception). Surfaced during the Augustus Odena refresh.

discoveries.context: Ex-OpenAI Chief Research Officer; CEO/co-founder of Arda (AI-for-manufacturing, w/ Augustus Odena + ex-Palantir Jakob Frick & Alex Mark). $20M seed + $70M at $700M (Founders Fund/Accel) = past inception. Index for network, not active pursuit.

discoveries.name: Matt Deitke
discoveries.context: 24yo; 1st author Molmo/Objaverse/ProcTHOR; co-founded Vercept (→Anthropic acquihire) but he went to META SUPERINTELLIGENCE on a reported ~$250M/4yr package (turned down $125M, Zuck doubled it). One-time founder who chose money/optionality over the team. THE single highest-priority departure-watch — T0 the moment he leaves Meta. @mattdeitke.

discoveries.name: Kiana Ehsani
discoveries.context: Vercept CEO (→Anthropic acquihire). Led robotics/embodied-AI at AI2 (ManipulaTHOR 1st author). Repeat-founder CEO now locked at Anthropic — future-departure cohort. @ehsanik.
